violations.description: PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): The drain plumbing on the 3-compartment sink is incorrectly plumbed. Right now the wash basin is indirectly plumbed. If only one sink basin is indirectly plumbed it should be the sanitizer basin. Check with city plumbing inspectors before altering drain for specifics on proper Plumbing Code considerations. Also the hand sink drain is incorrectly plumbed and should be changed. It is noted as an open pipe draining into a floor sink. The hand sink should have proper drain piping leading to the sanitary sewer. Also check with the City plumbing inspecors for specifics on proper Plumibing Code considerations.
